response:
silence breaks dawn.
shadows flee light.
mountains touch sky.
oceans roar deep.
deserts bloom green.
cities stand tall.
people dream wide.
leaders speak true.
truths set free.
fear turns hope.
hate yields love.
war ends peace.
peace brings joy.
joy feeds life.
life grows strong.
strength builds unity.
unity creates power.
power serves all.
all share bread.
bread fills bellies.
bellies know hunger.
hunger drives change.
change sparks action.
action moves mountains.
mountains shift ground.
ground holds roots.
roots drink rain.
rain washes dust.
dust clears air.
air breathes fresh.
fresh fills lungs.
lungs pump heart.
heart beats fast.
fast runs time.
time heals wounds.
wounds scar over.
over looks up.
up sees stars.
stars guide paths.
paths lead home.
home welcomes guests.
guests bring gifts.
gifts open doors.
doors reveal rooms.
rooms hold secrets.
secrets tell tales.
tales weave dreams.
dreams paint future.
future calls now.
now answers back.
back turns front.
front faces sun.
sun warms earth.
earth spins round.
round completes circle.
circle binds souls.
souls sing songs.
songs echo loud.
loud breaks chains.
chains fall down.
down rises up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
down meets up.
up meets down.
